# STRATOSYNC SYSTEM v1.1 (Integrated Package)
Built: 2026-02-18

This package consolidates:
- STRATOSYNC v1.0 Release Complete (demo + integrated_case + reports)
- STRATOSYNC Unified Architecture v1.1 (system unification docs)
- AXIS Core Engine v4.1.1 (Human Engine)
- ΩQCS v2.9 (Business Engine)

## Folder map
- 01_ARCHITECTURE: Unified architecture definition (v1.1)
- 03_HUMAN_ENGINE_AXIS_CORE: AXIS Core package (as Human Engine)
- 04_BUSINESS_ENGINE_QCS_CORE: ΩQCS package (as Business Engine)
- 05_STRATOSYNC_RELEASE_DEMO: v1.0 demo release + reports + manifests
- 00_MANIFEST: package manifest, hashes, and dependency map

## Intended use
This is an **integration bundle** for developers/architects. It preserves original artifacts without destructive merging.
